reviews.review_description: So far not many features (compared to SculptrVR), but it's polished and looks good. There's not much you can create with just voxels.

developer_response.body:
Thanks so much for the review! Don't let the minecraft crowd hear you say voxels are limited :D 
We're actively working on multi-player and a campaign mode - definitely check back for those!

reviews.review_description: It's really fun and easy to draw with cubes. Plus, there’s this cool explore space where you can share your creations and see what others are making, which is a lifesaver when you’re feeling uninspired! 😄

reviews.review_title: Surprisingly fun and easy to use
reviews.review_description: Love it! Didn't expect to have so much fun just drawing random stuff with friends. We even streamed on the TV and took turns trying to guess what the we were drawing. 5 stars!

The social aspect is a huge deal! Your published drawing go live in the explore feed for others to vote or remix. 
Otherwise very intuitive to draw.
